decisions: - Redaction Audit Trail: store each redacted field as a hash chain with a cryptographic accumulator; during authorized replay, reconstruct the plaintext and append an append-only access log entry containing requester identity, timestamp, and field scope.
Granular Access Lenses: role-based reveal rules on the hash, with immutable replay audit log
Replay Access Audit Log: every authorized replay of a redacted value appends an immutable, signed entry with principal identity, timestamp, and justification.
Context-Aware Reveal: redacted values appear as transient, copy-resistant overlays inside the span that consumed them, vanishing on focus loss.
Just-in-Time Reveal: use one-time reveal tokens during replay session to unseal originals in-memory, appending each reveal as an audit event.

decisions:
Merge Guard: automated replay of golden test scenarios across all agents on every pull request  
Merge Guard: agent-level diff of responses on failure, merge blocked, one-click rollback to prior green build.

Handoff Schema Guard: infer and enforce data contracts between agents; when output schema changes due to prompt edit, immediately highlight downstream agents that will break and require mismatch resolution before merging.

Audited Change Review: enforce mandatory second-person approval for all edits to agent prompts and tool configurations, and record every review decision with cryptographic signatures in an immutable audit log.
Explain Merge: auto-generate behavioral summary of workflow diffs, prompt author to refine it, attach final explanation to merge history
Cost-Impact Review: require a second person to approve an automated cost/latency impact report before any prompt or tool change lands
